exercises.audioScript: We must have chosen the right path.
exercises.hindiScript: हमने जरूर सही रास्ता चुना होगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They must have spent a lot of money.
We must have chosen the right path.
exercises.answer: We must have chosen the right path.

exercises.hindiScript: उसने जरूर मेहनत से पढ़ाई की होगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They must have made a mistake.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He must have thought a lot.
She must have told the truth.

exercises.audioScript: He must have talked to me.
exercises.hindiScript: उसने जरूर मुझसे बात की होगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We must have chosen the right path.
He must have talked to me.
exercises.answer: He must have talked to me.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We must have done it right.
He must have read this book.

exercises.hindiScript: उन्होंने जरूर यह देख लिया होगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He must have broken the promise.
She must have been very happy.

exercises.audioScript: He must have thought a lot.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He must have talked to me.
He must have worked very hard.
They must have spent a lot of money.
He must have thought a lot.
exercises.answer: He must have thought a lot.

exercises.hindiScript: वह जरूर घर पहुंच गई होगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

dictationPassage.text: We must have chosen the right path. He must have studied hard. They must have succeeded. He must have talked to me. She must have been sad.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: हमने जरूर सही रास्ता चुना होगा। उसने जरूर मेहनत से पढ़ाई की होगी। वे जरूर सफल हुए होंगे। उसने जरूर मुझसे बात की होगी। वह जरूर उदास हुई होगी।
